Case Study • Various

How we helped Primestar Publishes Annual Sustainability Report

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Primestar, a leading name in the diamond industry, has officially released its Annual Sustainability Report, reflecting the company’s strong commitment to ethical practices, climate action, and sustainable business growth.

The report highlights Primestar’ journey towards responsible sourcing, reducing carbon footprint, transparent ESG disclosures, and community empowerment initiatives. With sustainability at the core of its operations, the company continues to set new benchmarks for the diamond industry by balancing profitability with purpose.

Message From Primestar

At Primestar, sustainability is more than a responsibility – it is our way forward. This report is not just about what we achieved, but how we are shaping a future where business and sustainability go hand in hand,” said
Mr. Pranav Kothari, Director, Primestar.

The Annual Sustainability Report covers key focus areas including:

  • Environmental Stewardship: Initiatives for energy efficiency, waste management, and lowering greenhouse gas emissions.
  • Responsible Sourcing & Supply Chain: Strengthening transparency across the diamond value chain with ethical sourcing practices.
  • Social Responsibility: Investments in employee well-being, diversity, inclusion, and community development.

This milestone not only reflects Primestar’ sustainability journey but also resonates with its vision of achieving “Growth with Sustainability” – a philosophy shared by Growlity, the advisory partner behind the report.

Message From Growlity

We are proud to partner with Primestar in their ESG journey. The release of this report demonstrates how organizations can embed sustainability into their DNA and lead with responsibility,” said Mr. Shwetang Kapadia, Vice President ESG Advisory, Growlity Inc. USA.

About Primestar

Primestar is a trusted leader in the global diamond industry, recognized for its commitment to ethical sourcing, innovation, and sustainable business practices. The company continues to empower stakeholders while shaping a future where luxury meets responsibility.

About Growlity

Growlity is a global sustainability advisory firm helping businesses embed ESG, climate action, and responsible growth strategies. With the belief in “Growth with Sustainability”, Growlity has served 200+ clients across 25+ countries in building sustainable business models.
